name: grados
description: The enrichment-grade MCP server for academic paper search and full-text extraction. For science.
long_description: The enrichment-grade MCP server for academic paper search and full-text extraction. For science. GRaDOS gives AI agents the ability to search academic databases, download full-text papers through paywalls, and synthesize citation-grounded answers. It implements a waterfall extraction strategy (TDM API -> Open Access -> Sci-Hub -> Headless Browser) with progressive PDF parsing (LlamaParse -> Marker -> pdf-parse) and QA validation. Designed for campus network environments where institutional access provides database permissions. No API keys are strictly required - Crossref, PubMed, and Sci-Hub work with zero configuration.

tools.name: search_academic_papers
tools.description: Search multiple academic databases (Crossref, PubMed, Scopus, Web of Science, Springer) and return a deduplicated list of papers with metadata and abstracts.

tools.name: extract_paper_full_text
tools.description: Extract full text of a paper given its DOI using a waterfall strategy (TDM API -> Open Access -> Sci-Hub -> Browser). Returns Markdown with QA validation.

elsevier_api_key.title: Elsevier API Key
elsevier_api_key.description: API key from dev.elsevier.com (free with institutional access). Optional.

wos_api_key.title: Web of Science API Key
wos_api_key.description: API key from developer.clarivate.com (free starter tier). Optional.

springer_oa_api_key.title: Springer Nature OpenAccess API Key
springer_oa_api_key.description: API key from dev.springernature.com for full-text OA retrieval. Optional.

llamaparse_api_key.title: LlamaParse API Key
llamaparse_api_key.description: API key from cloud.llamaindex.ai for high-quality PDF parsing (free tier). Optional.

academic_email.title: Academic Email
academic_email.description: Your institutional email for Crossref/Unpaywall polite API access. Recommended.
